sourceName: Federal Reserve / FRED credit and financial-stress public data

HY_OAS.sourceName: Federal Reserve / FRED credit and financial-stress public data
HY_OAS.label: ICE BofA US High Yield Option-Adjusted Spread
HY_OAS.sourceNote: ICE BofA US High Yield Index OAS via FRED.

IG_OAS.sourceName: Federal Reserve / FRED credit and financial-stress public data
IG_OAS.label: ICE BofA US Corporate Option-Adjusted Spread
IG_OAS.sourceNote: ICE BofA US Corporate Index OAS via FRED.

BBB_OAS.sourceName: Federal Reserve / FRED credit and financial-stress public data
BBB_OAS.label: ICE BofA BBB US Corporate Option-Adjusted Spread
BBB_OAS.sourceNote: ICE BofA BBB US Corporate Index OAS via FRED.

NFCI.sourceName: Federal Reserve / FRED credit and financial-stress public data
NFCI.label: Chicago Fed National Financial Conditions Index
NFCI.sourceNote: Chicago Fed National Financial Conditions Index via FRED. Positive values indicate tighter-than-average financial conditions.

ANFCI.sourceName: Federal Reserve / FRED credit and financial-stress public data
ANFCI.label: Chicago Fed Adjusted National Financial Conditions Index
ANFCI.sourceNote: Chicago Fed adjusted NFCI via FRED. Positive values indicate tighter financial conditions after controlling for economic conditions.

STLFSI4.sourceName: Federal Reserve / FRED credit and financial-stress public data
STLFSI4.label: St. Louis Fed Financial Stress Index
STLFSI4.sourceNote: St. Louis Fed Financial Stress Index via FRED. Positive values indicate above-average financial stress.
